name: Quilted Fabric Cube Storage Bin - Light Pink - Cloud Island™
description:
Add extra storage to your little one's space with this Quilted Fabric Cube Storage Bin from cloud island™. This decorative cube storage bin features a light pink quilted fabric construction with wavy texture for fun style. Designed with attached handles for easy portability, this sturdy square-shaped basket is great for stowing toys, blankets and more. Plus, it can be spot cleaned for easy care.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
